src/api-gateway/resource-registry.ts.reason: Declarative resource contract currently centralises many database-backed resources.
src/api-gateway/resource-registry.ts.targetRefactor: Split into domain registries and generated composition without changing endpoint contracts.

src/modules/contabilidad/contabilidad-ac.reason: Legacy accounting orchestration combines class sales, journal posting, reversal and validation.
src/modules/contabilidad/contabilidad-ac.targetRefactor: Extract posting, reversal, class-sale and monetary-validation use cases under accounting contract tests.

src/modules/shared-crud/crud.service.ts.reason: Legacy generic CRUD service combines reads, writes, imports and metadata-driven validation.
src/modules/shared-crud/crud.service.ts.targetRefactor: Separate read, write and import responsibilities and restrict generic operations by capability.

src/common/services/resource-metadata.se.reason: Metadata resolution and caching remain coupled from the pre-hardening implementation.
src/common/services/resource-metadata.se.targetRefactor: Separate immutable registry lookup from request-scoped resolution and cache concerns.
